name: whatsrook
description: Lightweight, long-running WhatsApp daemon and bridge

SESSION.description: Phone number used to identify the WhatsApp session (e.g. 1234567890). Required.

PAIR.description: Set to true to request a pairing code upon startup.

QRCODE.description: Set to true to render QR code to stdout for scanning.

DEBUG.description: Set to true to enable debug logging.

VERBOSE.description: Set to true to enable verbose logging.
